name: network-state-closeout
description: Initialize a private global network-state skill, maintain categorized cards with progressive loading, and optionally synchronize it across devices through GitHub private repositories.

interface.shortDescription: Maintain private network facts and close out completed actions.
interface.longDescription: Create a private global network-state skill in the active Codex cache, load only relevant device and service cards, save confirmed facts locally with minimal ceremony, optionally synchronize across devices through a GitHub private repository, and create closeout cards only for substantial completed actions.
defaultPrompt: Use $initialize-network-state to create or adopt my private global network-state skill without scanning the network.
Use $initialize-network-state to help another device clone my GitHub private skill repository into its Codex skills cache.
Use $network-state to read only relevant cards and save confirmed updates locally without network synchronization.
Use $network-state to run the GitHub private synchronization gate and publish confirmed updates.
Use $action-closeout-cards only for this substantial completed action.
